activities_projects.title: Hydrological Cycle Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how the hydrological cycle maintains water availability on Earth
steps: Create a detailed diagram of the hydrological cycle
Explain each stage with scientific reasoning
Analyze how human activities like deforestation or urbanization affect the cycle
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students critically analyze the natural water cycle and human impacts
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of explanation and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Water Scarcity
activities_projects.objective: Compare water scarcity in two different regions
steps: Select two regions facing water scarcity
Analyze causes such as population growth, pollution, or over-exploitation
Compare government measures taken in both regions
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and supporting evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Multipurpose River Project Evaluation
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the benefits and drawbacks of a major river project
steps: Choose a major multipurpose project such as Sardar Sarovar or Bhakra Nangal
Analyze its economic, social, and environmental impacts
Present a balanced conclusion on whether such projects are beneficial
activities_projects.evaluation: Analytical depth and balanced argument (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Water Demand Projection
activities_projects.objective: Estimate future water demand in a city
steps: Collect current population data of a city
Estimate average daily water consumption per person
Project water demand for the next 20 years based on population growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand resource planning and forecasting
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of calculations and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Design an Urban Rainwater Harvesting Plan
activities_projects.objective: Create a sustainable rainwater harvesting model for a residential area
steps: Design a rainwater harvesting layout for a housing colony
Include rooftop collection, filtration, storage and groundwater recharge
Explain how the system reduces water shortages
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply knowledge to real-world water management problems

activities_projects.title: Traditional vs Modern Water Management
activities_projects.objective: Compare traditional and modern water conservation techniques
steps: Research traditional systems such as tankas, johads, and bamboo drip irrigation
Study modern methods like dams and irrigation canals
Evaluate which methods are more sustainable in the long term
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students assess sustainability of water management practices
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Industrial Impact on Water Resources
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how industries affect water quality and availability
steps: Identify industries in a nearby region
Analyze types of pollutants released into water bodies
Suggest policies and technologies to reduce industrial water pollution
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and proposed solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Inter-State Water Conflict Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze political and economic aspects of water disputes
steps: Select a river water dispute such as Cauvery or Krishna-Godavari
Explain the causes of the conflict
Analyze how legal or political negotiations attempt to resolve it
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand governance and resource conflict issues
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of case study and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Water Conservation Awareness Campaign
steps: Design a campaign to educate people about water conservation
Include slogans, posters, and community activities
Explain how the campaign could change public behavior
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop leadership and environmental awareness
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and effectiveness of plan (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Policy Recommendation Report
activities_projects.objective: Propose government policies for sustainable water management
steps: Identify major water management challenges in India
Analyze existing government initiatives
Write a short policy recommendation report with practical solutions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop policy thinking and problem-solving skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of recommendations and logical reasoning (10 marks)
